allow: Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.fantasypros.com/nfl/projections/qb.php?week=draft&scoring=HALF")

Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/nf_qb.html -w "%{http_code}" "https://www.numberfire.com/nfl/fantasy/fantasy-football-projections/qb" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8" -H "Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5" -L)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://fdresearch-api.fanduel.com/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: https://www.fanduel.com' -H 'Referer: https://www.fanduel.com/research/nfl/fantasy/fantasy-football-projections/qb' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"PlayerPositions\\"\) { enumValues { name } } }"}' -w '\\nHTTP: %{http_code}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://fdresearch-api.fanduel.com/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: https://www.fanduel.com' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"ProjectionSports\\"\) { enumValues { name } } }"}')
